description: hex MCP tool definitions — single source of truth for CLI, MCP server, and SpacetimeDB sync

tools.name: hex_analyze
tools.description: Architecture health check: boundary violations, dead exports, circular deps

tools.name: hex_analyze_json
tools.description: Architecture health check returning raw JSON (for programmatic use)

tools.name: hex_status
tools.description: Show project status and service health

tools.name: hex_hexflo_swarm_init
tools.description: Initialize a new swarm for coordinated multi-agent work

tools.name: hex_hexflo_swarm_status
tools.description: Get status of all active swarms with tasks and agents

tools.name: hex_hexflo_swarm_complete
tools.description: Mark a swarm as completed (archives it while preserving data for reporting)

id.description: Swarm ID to mark as completed

tools.name: hex_hexflo_swarm_fail
tools.description: Mark a swarm as failed with a reason (archives it while preserving data for reporting)

id.description: Swarm ID to mark as failed

tools.name: hex_hexflo_task_create
tools.description: Create a task in a swarm

swarm_id.description: Swarm ID to add task to

tools.name: hex_hexflo_task_list
tools.description: List tasks in a swarm

tools.name: hex_hexflo_task_assign
tools.description: Assign a task to an agent. Sets status to 'in_progress' and records the agent_id. Only works on tasks with 'pending' status. Pass 'version' for optimistic locking (CAS) — returns 409 on conflict. Omit version to skip check (legacy).

agent_id.description: Agent ID claiming this task (from hex_agent_connect registration)

version.description: Expected task version for CAS (omit to skip version check)

tools.name: hex_hexflo_swarm_transfer
tools.description: Transfer swarm ownership to a new agent. The current owner loses the swarm; the new owner gains it. New owner must not already own an active swarm.

new_owner_agent_id.description: Agent ID of the new owner

tools.name: hex_hexflo_agent_swarm
tools.description: Get the active swarm owned by a specific agent (if any). Returns 404 if agent has no active swarm.

id.description: Agent ID to look up owned swarm for

tools.name: hex_hexflo_task_complete
tools.description: Mark a task as completed

tools.name: hex_hexflo_memory_store
tools.description: Store a key-value pair in persistent memory

tools.name: hex_hexflo_memory_retrieve
tools.description: Retrieve a value by key from persistent memory

tools.name: hex_hexflo_memory_search
tools.description: Search persistent memory by query

tools.name: hex_adr_list
tools.description: List Architecture Decision Records

status.description: Filter by status: proposed, accepted, deprecated, superseded

tools.name: hex_adr_search
tools.description: Search ADRs by keyword

tools.name: hex_adr_status
tools.description: Show detailed status of a specific ADR

tools.name: hex_adr_abandoned
tools.description: Find stale/abandoned proposed ADRs

days.description: Days without update to consider abandoned (default 14)

tools.name: hex_plan_list
tools.description: List existing workplans from docs/workplans/

tools.name: hex_plan_status
tools.description: Show detailed status of a specific workplan

tools.name: hex_plan_execute
tools.description: Start executing a workplan from a JSON file path. Spawns agents per task, tracks progress in SpacetimeDB.

file.description: Path to workplan JSON file (e.g. docs/workplans/feat-auth.json)

tools.name: hex_plan_pause
tools.description: Pause the currently running workplan execution

tools.name: hex_plan_resume
tools.description: Resume a paused workplan execution

tools.name: hex_plan_report
tools.description: Get aggregate report for a workplan execution — phases, tasks, agents, gates, duration

tools.name: hex_plan_history
tools.description: List all workplan executions (active + completed + failed) from SpacetimeDB

tools.name: hex_agent_connect
tools.description: Register this Claude Code session (or any agent) with hex-nexus. Returns an agentId for heartbeats and task assignment.

name.description: Agent display name (default: auto-generated from host)

session_id.description: Claude Code session ID (stored in metadata)

tools.name: hex_agent_disconnect
tools.description: Deregister an agent from hex-nexus by its agentId

tools.name: hex_agent_list
tools.description: List all agents currently registered with hex-nexus (local + remote)

tools.name: hex_nexus_status
tools.description: Check hex-nexus daemon status

tools.name: hex_nexus_start
tools.description: Start the hex-nexus daemon

tools.name: hex_secrets_status
tools.description: Show secrets backend status

tools.name: hex_secrets_has
tools.description: Check if a secret key exists

tools.name: hex_inference_add
tools.description: Register an inference endpoint (Ollama, OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.) with hex-nexus

provider_type.description: Provider type: ollama, openai, anthropic, etc.

key.description: API key secret name (omit for keyless providers like local Ollama)

tools.name: hex_inference_list
tools.description: List all registered inference endpoints and their status

tools.name: hex_inference_test
tools.description: Test connectivity to a registered inference endpoint

target.description: Endpoint ID or URL to test

tools.name: hex_inference_bench
tools.description: Benchmark a model with hex-specific prompts (code-gen, reasoning, identity). Returns quality score, tok/s, and recommended hex agent tier.

target.description: Provider ID, model name, or URL to benchmark

tools.name: hex_inference_discover
tools.description: Discover inference endpoints on the local network (LAN scan)

tools.name: hex_inference_remove
tools.description: Remove a registered inference endpoint

tools.name: hex_inbox_notify
tools.description: Send a notification to an agent or broadcast to all agents in a project (ADR-060)

agent_id.description: Target agent ID (mutually exclusive with project_id)

project_id.description: Target project ID for broadcast (mutually exclusive with agent_id)

kind.description: Notification kind: restart, update, shutdown, config_change, info

tools.name: hex_inbox_query
tools.description: Query an agent's notification inbox (ADR-060)

agent_id.description: Agent ID to query inbox for

tools.name: hex_inbox_ack
tools.description: Acknowledge a notification (only the target agent can ack) (ADR-060)

tools.name: hex_enforce_list
tools.description: List all enforcement rules (local .hex/adr-rules.toml + SpacetimeDB)

tools.name: hex_enforce_mode
tools.description: Show current enforcement mode (mandatory/advisory/disabled) from .hex/project.json

tools.name: hex_enforce_sync
tools.description: Sync enforcement rules from .hex/adr-rules.toml to SpacetimeDB

tools.name: hex_enforce_prompt
tools.description: Generate the enforcement system prompt for non-MCP models (ADR-2603221959 P6)

tools.name: hex_test_history
tools.description: Show recent test run history with pass/fail counts and durations

tools.name: hex_test_trends
tools.description: Show test pass rate trends across recent runs

runs.description: Number of recent runs to include (default 10)

tools.name: hex_project_list
tools.description: List all projects registered with hex-nexus

tools.name: hex_project_register
tools.description: Register a project with hex-nexus for tracking and coordination

path.description: Absolute path to the project root

name.description: Optional project name (defaults to directory name)

tools.name: hex_session_start
tools.description: Start a hex session — register agent, load context. Use this instead of hooks for non-Claude providers (ADR-2603221959)

model.description: LLM model name (e.g. llama3, qwen2, claude-sonnet)

tools.name: hex_session_heartbeat
tools.description: Send heartbeat and check inbox. Call periodically to keep agent alive (ADR-2603221959)

tools.name: hex_workplan_activate
tools.description: Set the active workplan for this session. Required before mutating operations in mandatory mode (ADR-2603221959)

tools.name: hex_git_status
tools.description: Show git status for a project (staged, unstaged, untracked files)

tools.name: hex_git_log
tools.description: Show recent git commit log for a project

tools.name: hex_git_diff
tools.description: Show git diff (unstaged changes) for a project

tools.name: hex_git_branches
tools.description: List git branches for a project

tools.name: hex_secrets_grant
tools.description: Grant an agent access to a secret key with stated purpose

agent_id.description: Agent ID to grant access to

secret_key.description: Secret key name to grant access to

purpose.description: Stated purpose for accessing this secret

tools.name: hex_secrets_revoke
tools.description: Revoke a previously granted secret access

tools.name: hex_secrets_vault_set
tools.description: Store a secret in the hex vault

tools.name: hex_secrets_vault_get
tools.description: Retrieve a secret from the hex vault by key

tools.name: hex_agent_id
tools.description: Get the current agent's ID from the session state file (no nexus call needed)

tools.name: hex_agent_info
tools.description: Get detailed info about a specific hex agent by ID

tools.name: hex_agent_audit
tools.description: Audit trail: cross-reference git commits with HexFlo task completions for an agent

agent_id.description: Agent ID to audit (defaults to current session agent)

tools.name: hex_neural_lab_config_create
tools.description: Create a neural architecture configuration with hyperparameters

parent_id.description: Parent config ID for lineage tracking

tools.name: hex_neural_lab_config_list
tools.description: List neural architecture configurations with optional filters

tools.name: hex_neural_lab_experiment_create
tools.description: Create an experiment to evaluate a config against a hypothesis

hypothesis.description: Hypothesis text describing what this experiment tests

tools.name: hex_neural_lab_experiment_list
tools.description: List experiments with optional lineage and status filters

status.description: Filter by status (pending, running, completed, failed)

tools.name: hex_neural_lab_frontier
tools.description: Get the Pareto frontier (best loss vs params tradeoff) for a lineage

tools.name: hex_neural_lab_strategies
tools.description: List available mutation strategies for neural architecture search

tools.name: hex_neural_lab_loop_start
tools.description: Start the autonomous experiment loop for a lineage

tools.name: hex_neural_lab_loop_stop
tools.description: Stop the autonomous experiment loop for a lineage

tools.name: hex_exec
tools.description: Execute a hex CLI subcommand and return its output. Use for running hex commands like 'plan list', 'adr search <query>', 'analyze .', 'status', etc.

subcommand.description: The hex subcommand and arguments, e.g. "plan list" or "adr search authentication"

tools.name: hex_dev_start
tools.description: Start the dev pipeline for a project (watch mode, build, serve)

tools.name: hex_dev_status
tools.description: Check dev pipeline status (running processes, ports, health)

tools.name: hex_dev_stop
tools.description: Stop the dev pipeline and all associated processes

tools.name: hex_report_workplan
tools.description: Get aggregate report for a workplan execution — phases, tasks, agents, gates, duration

tools.name: hex_report_test
tools.description: Show test pass rate trends across recent runs

tools.name: hex_report_swarm
tools.description: Get status of all active swarms with tasks and agents

tools.name: hex_stdb_health
tools.description: Check SpacetimeDB connection health and module status

tools.name: hex_stdb_query
tools.description: Execute a SQL query against SpacetimeDB (SELECT only for safety)

sql.description: SQL query to execute (SELECT statements only)

tools.name: hex_stdb_tables
tools.description: List tables in a SpacetimeDB database

tools.name: hex_doctor
tools.description: Aggregate health check across all hex subsystems: nexus, SpacetimeDB, secrets, inference

tools.name: hex_context_get
tools.description: Get architecture context for the current project

tools.name: hex_context_inject
tools.description: Reload architecture context into nexus (mutates cached state)

tools.name: hex_spec_list
tools.description: List all behavioral specs in the project

tools.name: hex_spec_get
tools.description: Get the contents of a specific behavioral spec

name.description: Name of the spec to retrieve

tools.name: hex_spec_validate
tools.description: Validate behavioral specs against implementation

spec_name.description: Name of a specific spec to validate (optional — validates all if omitted)

tools.name: hex_readme_generate
tools.description: Generate a README.md for the project (writes file to disk)

tools.name: hex_readme_check
tools.description: Check if the project README is up to date with the current codebase

tools.name: hex_sandbox_spawn
tools.description: Spawn a Docker sandbox agent for isolated code execution

tools.name: hex_sandbox_stop
tools.description: Stop a running sandbox agent

agent_id.description: ID of the sandbox agent to stop

tools.name: hex_sandbox_list
tools.description: List running sandbox agents

tools.name: hex_init
tools.description: Initialize hex in a target project (creates config files, hooks, and agent definitions)

path.description: Project path to initialize (default: current directory)

tools.name: hex_ci_status
tools.description: Check CI pipeline status for the current project

tools.name: hex_ci_run
tools.description: Trigger a CI pipeline run for the current project

tools.name: hex_hook_list
tools.description: List all configured hooks for the current project

tools.name: hex_hook_status
tools.description: Show hook execution status and recent invocations

tools.name: hex_chat_send
tools.description: Send a chat message to an agent or channel

tools.name: hex_chat_history
tools.description: Get chat history for a channel

channel.description: Channel to get history for (default: general)

limit.description: Maximum number of messages to return (default: 20)

tools.name: hex_skill_list
tools.description: List available hex skills

tools.name: hex_validate
tools.description: Run post-build semantic validation on a path

tools.name: hex_opencode_status
tools.description: Check OpenCode integration status

tools.name: hex_opencode_config
tools.description: Get or set OpenCode configuration. With no params lists all config; with key returns that value; with key+value sets it.

key.description: Configuration key to get or set

value.description: Value to set (requires key). If omitted, returns current value.

tools.name: hex_session_event
tools.description: Send an event to a running agent session

session_id.description: Session ID to send event to

tools.name: hex_session_interrupt
tools.description: Interrupt a running agent session with new instructions

tools.name: hex_environment_create
tools.description: Create a new container environment

tools.name: hex_environment_list
tools.description: List all container environments

tools.name: hex_brief
tools.description: Developer briefing: pending decisions, recent activity, project health (ADR-2604131500)

project.description: Filter to a specific project ID

tools.name: hex_decide
tools.description: Respond to a pending decision (approve/reject/defer/override)

tools.name: hex_trust_show
tools.description: Show delegation trust levels per project and scope

project.description: Filter to a specific project ID

tools.name: hex_trust_set
tools.description: Set delegation trust level for a project scope

tools.name: hex_steer
tools.description: Send a steering directive to adjust agent behavior

tools.name: hex_pulse
tools.description: One-glance system pulse: agents, decisions, completions, health

tools.name: hex_taste_list
tools.description: List developer taste preferences. Returns preferences filtered by scope and category.

category.description: Filter by category (naming, structure, testing, dependencies, style, architecture)

tools.name: hex_taste_set
tools.description: Set a developer taste preference. Preferences are injected into agent prompts.

category.description: Category (naming, structure, testing, dependencies, style, architecture)

tools.name: hex_new
tools.description: Structured project intake: create or adopt a directory, register the project, seed trust at suggest level, and optionally copy taste preferences (ADR-2604131500 §2).

path.description: Target directory path for the new project

taste_from.description: Copy taste preferences from this existing project

tools.name: hex_pause
tools.description: Emergency pause: halt the active workplan. In-flight agents finish their current task but no new tasks are dispatched. AIOS Override layer (ADR-2604131500 §1 Layer 4).

tools.name: hex_resume
tools.description: Resume a paused workplan. Dispatches the next tier of tasks. AIOS Override layer (ADR-2604131500 §1 Layer 4).

tools.name: hex_override
tools.description: Emergency override: send a priority-2 notification to all agents in a project. Agents must acknowledge before continuing. AIOS Override layer (ADR-2604131500 §1 Layer 4).

instruction.description: Override instruction (free text, e.g. 'stop all deploys', 'revert last commit')
